testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from business owners using ReviewHub
testimonials.review1Text: Our average review response time dropped from 6 hours to 30 minutes. Thanks to the AI reply feature, we can send professional responses quickly.
testimonials.review2Text: After requesting reviews via WhatsApp, we gained 40 new Google reviews in just one month. New customer traffic has noticeably increased.
testimonials.review3Text: At $19/month, this is the best value out there. Negative review alerts let us respond immediately, and our rating went from 4.2 to 4.7.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: ReviewHub ("Company") values your privacy and protects your personal information in accordance with the New Zealand Privacy Act 2020 and other applicable laws. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and share personal information when you use our review management service.
section1Sub1Items: Business name, industry, location (during service use)
Payment information (processed via Stripe; card numbers are not stored by us)
section1Sub2Items: IP address, browser information, access time
Usage patterns via cookies and similar technologies
section1Sub3Items: Google Business Profile: OAuth tokens, business review data
Facebook/Meta: Page access tokens, recommendation data
section2Items: Sending review request messages via WhatsApp
Generating AI-powered review responses (using Anthropic API)
privacy.section3Intro: We share data with the following service providers to operate our service:
privacy.section4Content: Personal information is retained for the duration of your account. Upon account deletion request, data is permanently deleted within 30 days, except where retention is required by law (including the Privacy Act 2020).
privacy.section5Intro: Under the Privacy Act 2020, you have the right to:

section5Items.name: Access
section5Items.desc: Request access to your collected personal data.

section5Items.name: Deletion
section5Items.desc: Request deletion of your personal data.

section5Items.name: Portability
section5Items.desc: Request transfer of your data to another service.

privacy.section5Outro: You can exercise these rights via the Settings page or by emailing support@reviewhub.app. You may also lodge a complaint with the Office of the Privacy Commissioner.
privacy.section6Content: We use cookies for authentication, functionality, and analytics purposes. For details, see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.section7Content: We implement technical and organizational measures including SSL encryption, access controls, and regular security audits. OAuth tokens are stored encrypted, and passwords are hashed with bcrypt.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: ReviewHub ("Service") is an integrated review management platform for small businesses, providing a SaaS solution to manage reviews from Google, Yelp, Facebook, WhatsApp, and other platforms in one place.
section2Items: Registration is required to use the Service.
Users must provide accurate information and keep it up to date.
Accounts are personal and may not be transferred to others.
The Service may not be used for illegal or inappropriate purposes.
section3Items: After the 14-day free trial, a paid plan must be selected.
Payments are processed via Stripe and auto-renew monthly or annually.
Plan changes can be made anytime in Settings and take effect at the next billing cycle.
Prices may change with prior notice.
terms.section4Content: Each plan has usage limits (AI responses, WhatsApp requests, number of businesses, etc.). Features may be restricted when limits are exceeded.
section5Items: All software, design, logos, and other intellectual property of the Service belong to the Company.
Business information and review responses entered by users remain the property of the user.
AI-generated responses may be freely used by the user.
terms.section6Content: If you are a consumer under the Consumer Guarantees Act 1993, the Service must be provided with reasonable care and skill. Nothing in these terms limits your rights under the Consumer Guarantees Act 1993.
section7Items: The Company is not responsible for API changes or service disruptions by external platforms (Google, Yelp, Facebook, WhatsApp).
We do not guarantee the accuracy or appropriateness of AI-generated responses; final review is the user's responsibility.
The Company is not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure, system failures, or similar events.
section8Items: Users may cancel the Service at any time.
Upon cancellation, the Service remains accessible until the end of the current billing period.
Annual subscriptions may be refunded within 14 days of payment.
Account deletion requests have a 30-day grace period during which cancellation is possible.
terms.section9Content: The Company may modify these terms with prior notice via email and in-app notification. If you do not agree to the updated terms, you may cancel the Service.
terms.section10Content: These terms are governed by the laws of New Zealand. Any disputes will be subject to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the New Zealand courts.
terms.section11Content: For inquiries about these terms: support@reviewhub.app

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how ReviewHub ("Service") uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookie.section1Content: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser when you visit a website. They allow websites to remember your preferences and provide a better experience.
cookie.section2Sub1Intro: Required for the Service to function. These cannot be disabled.
cookie.section2Sub2Intro: Enhance your experience with personalized settings.
cookie.section2Sub3Intro: Help us analyze usage patterns to improve the Service. Activated only with your consent.
cookie.section3Content1: You can decline analytics cookies via the cookie banner at the bottom of the page. You can also manage or delete cookies through your browser settings.
cookie.section3Content2: Disabling cookies may limit some features of the Service.
cookie.section4Content: When connecting external platforms such as Google or Facebook, those platforms may set their own cookies. These cookies are subject to each platform's cookie policy.

winback.stat: 45% of potential customers avoid businesses with unanswered negative reviews.
winback.ctaMessage: Come back now to check and respond to your reviews right away.
